---
name: Balance Concern
about: Flag something as too strong, too weak, or creating non-games
labels: balance
---

## Document and Section

> Which file and section does this concern?

**File:** 
**Section:** 

---

## What Feels Off

- [ ] Too strong (oppressive, removes player agency)
- [ ] Too weak (never worth using, no meaningful impact)
- [ ] Creates non-games (trivially wins or loses on its own)
- [ ] Confusing to resolve (slows the game down)
- [ ] Other: ___________

---

## Description

> What specifically is the concern? Reference the rule by name or quote it.

---

## Supporting Evidence

> When did this come up? How many games? What was the outcome?

---

## Proposed Adjustment *(optional)*

> If you have a specific fix in mind, describe it here. Keep it minimal — prefer the smallest change that solves the problem.
